task_completion.description: OpenRocket is open with the simple model rocket design loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is visible, and the design tree shows the components of a model rocket.

task_completion.description: A drogue parachute is added and configured to deploy at apogee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The design tree shows two parachutes. A configuration window for the drogue parachute shows its deployment event set to 'Apogee' and its diameter is smaller than the main parachute.

task_completion.description: The main parachute is configured with a diameter of at least 600mm and set to deploy at an altitude of 300 meters or lower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration window for the main parachute shows a diameter of 600mm (60cm or 0.6m) or more, and the deployment event is set to a specific altitude of 300m or less.

task_completion.description: A flight simulation is run verifying the recovery system, with a ground hit velocity of 15 m/s or less.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket shows a completed simulation run with the 'Ground hit velocity' column displaying a value of 15 m/s or less.

task_completion.description: The modified design is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title or a 'Save As' dialog indicates the file is saved as 'simple_model_rocket.ork' in the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: A conversion report is written detailing the parachute sizes and deployment altitudes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/exports/dual_deploy_conversion_report.txt'. The text includes details about the sizes and deployment altitudes of both the drogue and main parachutes.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface, rather than terminal commands editing the .ork XML file directly.

integrity.description: The simulation results are visible within the OpenRocket application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The flight simulation results are shown in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab, not just typed into a text file or terminal.

integrity.description: The values written in the conversion report match the configurations visible in the OpenRocket GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parachute sizes and deployment altitudes in the text report are consistent with the values seen in the OpenRocket configuration windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The modified .ork file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork. The conversion report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/exports/dual_deploy_conversion_report.txt. The main parachute deployment altitude must be <= 300.0 meters. The main parachute diameter must be >= 0.600 meters (600mm). The drogue parachute diameter must be strictly less than the main parachute diameter. The flight simulation ground hit velocity must be <= 15.0 m/s.
